body:
## Problem

`api/sitemap.js` line 140 defines 8 brands in `gearBrands`: tama, pearl, dw, ludwig, zildjian, paiste, meinl, **sabian**.

The `public/llms/brands/` directory has: dw.md, ludwig.md, mapex.md, meinl.md, paiste.md, pearl.md, tama.md, zildjian.md — **no sabian.md**.

Once #1781 fixes the sitemap to include `/llms/brands/<slug>.md` entries, Googlebot and AI crawlers will try to fetch `/llms/brands/sabian.md` and get a 404. Sabian is the 4th-largest cymbal brand used by metal drummers in our database.

**Also noted:** `mapex.md` exists but Mapex is NOT in the `gearBrands` array — it won't be sitemapped. Consider adding Mapex to gearBrands (or removing the orphaned file).

## Fix

Create `public/llms/brands/sabian.md` following the same template as `public/llms/brands/meinl.md` or `public/llms/brands/zildjian.md`.

Content shape (≥300 words):
```markdown
# Sabian Cymbals — Metal Drummer Guide | MetalForge

## About Sabian
Sabian was founded in 1981 by Robert Zildjian in Meductic, New Brunswick, Canada...
[brand history, metal usage stats, flagship series for metal: HHX, AAX, Artisan, Paragon]

## Sabian Cymbals Used by Metal Drummers
| Drummer | Band | Sabian Series | Model |
...

## Metal-Focused Sabian Series
### HHX Evolution Series...
### AAX Series...
### Artisan Series...

## FAQ
**Q: Do any famous metal drummers use Sabian?**
A: ...

**Q: What Sabian cymbal is best for metal?**
A: ...

**Q: How does Sabian compare to Zildjian for metal?**
A: ...
```

## Quality gate

- ≥300 words
- 3+ FAQ Q&A
- Table of metal drummers using Sabian
- Internal links to drummer profiles and brand comparison pages

## Verify

1. `ls public/llms/brands/` — sabian.md present
2. `wc -w public/llms/brands/sabian.md` — ≥300 words
3. `curl https://metalforge.io/llms/brands/sabian.md` — returns 200 (after #1781 sitemap fix)

## Done

- [ ] `public/llms/brands/sabian.md` created (≥300 words, 3 FAQ, internal links)
title: SEO: /llms/brands/sabian.md — missing brand LLM file (will 404 after #1781 sitemap fix)
